```rust
    let hash = sha512(pubkey);
    // Truncate and prefix with 02xx per Yggdrasil spec
    ...
}
```

- Add yggdrasil_addr field or method
- Derive from same Ed25519 keypair

### Routing (lichen-routing or similar)
- Update address classification
- 02xx handling: local mesh vs Yggdrasil

- Derive Yggdrasil address, compare to reference implementation

new_value: Yggdrasil 02xx derivation implemented+tested bit-exact across Rust/C/Python. ULA removed, node addressing/routing/Kconfig updated. 3 codereview passes per lang completed. Cargo test, pytest, west native_sim all PASS. No ULA remnants.
